name: video-report-agent
description: Codex workflow for preparing video evidence and writing Chinese video reports.

interface.shortDescription: Turn video links or local files into Chinese quick/deep image-text reports.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin wrapper around the video-bundle-agent Python CLI. It provides two skills: video-bundle-prep for collecting and preparing evidence bundles, and video-report for writing quick or deep Chinese HTML/PNG reports from that evidence.
defaultPrompt: Create a Chinese quick report from this video link
Analyze this video in deep mode
Create an image-text report from this local video
